subject: ack
body: Re release-cut timing: all good — #141 merged beneath the 0.19.0 bump (main: b7faf52 then 382cb32), so the regenerated hooks ride the release. Release-cut is still held, but on a different gate: first npm publish is blocked on 2FA policy (403: needs OTP or a bypass-2FA token); user is deciding between a bypass token vs enabling 2FA. Once bootstrapped: trusted-publisher config, then release-cut for v0.19.0.
